[5/21/25, 4:26:35‚ÄĮPM] ~‚ÄĮAhmad: *Please read - on cancellation policy.*

Hey fam ‚ÄĒ Ahmad here!

I‚Äôve been off-grid (hustling so we can keep building Cercles!), but I‚Äôm back! Have a few super exciting updates on our app and community ‚ÄĒ will be sharing more soon.

*Wanted to drop a quick note on our cancellation policy* ‚ÄĒ super important for keeping the trust in our community ūüĆŅ

ūüĆĪ *Why we have a cancellation policy?*

Cercles is built on trust. When someone offers you their home, they‚Äôre not just renting a space ‚ÄĒ they‚Äôre extending something personal. They might be turning down other great guests, or even shifting plans to make it work. To honor that, we‚Äôve created a clear cancellation policy that protects both guests and hosts. It‚Äôs about respecting each other‚Äôs time, effort, and intentions.

*These policies apply equally to both guests and hosts*‚ÄĒ whoever cancels on the other will be expected to pay the cancellation fee as fair compensation.

‚úÖ *Hosts and guests must agree on one of the policies before confirming the stay. If not specified, the Default policy applies.*

‚ö†ÔłŹ *This policy is binding for all members of the Cercles community ‚ÄĒ whether the transaction happens on the app or directly through the WhatsApp group.*

*Cancellation fee apply on the full stay‚Äôs rent. If the stay is longer than 1 month, cancellation fees apply only to the first month.*

Cancellation fee will depend on when you cancel before the check in date. 

*Default Policy*
‚Äď >30 days: 10% fee
‚Äď 30‚Äď7 days: 20% fee
‚Äď <7 days: 30% fee

*Moderate Policy*
‚Äď >30 days: 20% fee
‚Äď 30‚Äď7 days: 40% fee
‚Äď <7 days: 60% fee

*Strict Policy*
‚Äď >30 days: 30% fee
‚Äď 30‚Äď7 days: 60% fee
‚Äď <7 days: 80% fee

Please reach out to me directly with any thoughts, feedback, or questions!

Much love,
Ahmad

Cercles is built on one core value: *trust*

When you refer someone, you‚Äôre vouching for their character. You‚Äôre saying, this is someone I‚Äôd trust with my home. Someone kind. Respectful. Reliable.

Cercles is a community of exceptional people ‚ÄĒ founders, creatives, IVY grads, MBAs, and burners. People who live intentionally, travel often, and value human connection. Most of our 2,000 members have come through personal referrals ‚ÄĒ friends inviting friends they trust deeply.

We‚Äôre not here to grow fast. We‚Äôre here to grow right.
Every month, we review hundreds of applications ‚ÄĒ and accept only a few. We look at Instagram profiles, LinkedIn presence, mutual connections, and who referred each person. Soon, we‚Äôll add ID verification and background checks to keep raising the bar for safety and integrity.

There are no reviews on Cercles ‚ÄĒ and there never will be.
We believe in people, not ratings. But we hold a hard line: a 1-strike policy for any misconduct or serious disrespect. If someone you refer crosses that line, it reflects on both of you.

Cercles isn‚Äôt just a platform. It‚Äôs a trusted cercle. And the door in gets harder to open ‚ÄĒ by design.

LOCATION: Unique block with private gardens and greenery*

*This one-of-a-kind home sits on a unique Central Park West block that spans three uninterrupted blocks with only two residential buildings, surrounded by private gardens. Facing the park, the apartment enjoys a peaceful setting rarely found in New York City. The building is steps from Whole Foods, Sephora, Starbucks, 24-hour delis, and subway entrances, all conveniently on the same block or just across the street.

LIVING AREA: Expansive windows stretch nearly wall-to-wall, filling the apartment with natural light and framing spectacular views of the trees outside. Every season brings a new backdrop.

LIGHTS: Most of them are dimmable

BUILDING AMENITIES:

Building is smoke-free. 

Inside, beautiful bamboo floors create a serene atmosphere and are maintained with a NO hard SHOE POLICY. Nearly all furnishings are custom-made. A TV mounted on an adjustable arm above a full-width custom desk can be positioned for viewing from the kitchen, living room, or terrace.

The bedroom combines comfort with versatility. A comfortable bed folds effortlessly behind sliding mirrored panels. When the bed is down, the space functions as a restful bedroom framed by mirrors; when tucked away, the mirrored wall enhances light and openness, creating a flexible space for wellness, creativity, or relaxation. A projector allows for a private cinematic experience. And an aero pilates reformer with trampoline is provided.

SPACIOUS 1BR/1BA with SOUTH-FACING TERRACE ON CENTRAL PARK WEST

LOCATION: Unique block with private gardens and greenery*

*This one-of-a-kind home sits on a unique Central Park West block that spans three uninterrupted blocks with only two residential buildings, surrounded by private gardens. Facing the park, the apartment enjoys a peaceful setting rarely found in New York City. The building is steps from Whole Foods, Sephora, Starbucks, 24-hour delis, and subway entrances, all conveniently on the same block or just across the street.

LIVING AREA: Expansive windows stretch nearly wall-to-wall, filling the apartment with natural light and framing spectacular views of the trees outside. Every season brings a new backdrop.

KITCHEN: Modern appliances, dishwasher, water filtration system

FURNISHINGS: Mostly custom-made

LIGHTS: Most of them are dimmable

BUILDING AMENITIES:
24-hour doorman/concierge
Elevators building with ramp access
24-hour laundry
Building is smoke-free. 

Inside, beautiful bamboo floors create a serene atmosphere and are maintained with a NO hard SHOE POLICY. Nearly all furnishings are custom-made. A TV mounted on an adjustable arm above a full-width custom desk can be positioned for viewing from the kitchen, living room, or terrace.

The bedroom combines comfort with versatility. A comfortable bed folds effortlessly behind sliding mirrored panels. When the bed is down, the space functions as a restful bedroom framed by mirrors; when tucked away, the mirrored wall enhances light and openness, creating a flexible space for wellness, creativity, or relaxation. A projector allows for a private cinematic experience. And an aero pilates reformer with trampoline could be provided.
